examples: His travels took him to Peru, among other places.
About two hundred people died in the earthquake which hit northern Peru.
The World Health Organization says a cholera epidemic in Peru could spread throughout Latin America.
We ate beef and drank malbec in Argentina, ogled beaches in Brazil and climbed Machu Picchu in Peru.
Mari Solari, the Welsh owner of Las Pallas gift shop, has lived in Peru for 45 years.
